name: Mystery Egg Shop Simulator - Prologue
description: Run your very own mystery egg shop! Stock shelves, manage customers, and grow your business. Every egg hides a surprise, you can sell them sealed, or open them to discover what’s inside? Unbox action figures, trade collectibles, and build themed dioramas to increase their value.

name: Hog Havoc
description: Miss old school fun? Hog Havoc lets you race & fight against friends or bots for FREE. Battle with Chaos Balls, dodge hazards & stay alive in frenetic low poly action made for older hardware. Multiple modes, courses & atmospheres. Up to 4 local players split screen - 8 Player online P2P coming soon

name: Planet Gemini
description: Planet Gemini is a factory-building and tower defense game. After crash-landing on two planets during an interdimensional journey, fend off waves of enemies and research a portal to survive.

name: Hidden Objects - Items Find
developer: A A G BROTHERS SOFTWARE DESIGN
publisher: A A G BROTHERS SOFTWARE DESIGN
description: Explore atmospheric locations, search for and find hidden objects in an engaging puzzle game!

name: Factory Reset
description: Investigate a malfunctioning robot factory. Hack them, befriend them, or dispose of them. Every choice changes what you find.

name: Violet Mansion
description: Violet Mansion is a horror puzzle game where you and your friends must survive against various enemies by using absurd items, finding creative solutions... and pushing people down stairs. Or you alone get to uncover the story of two friends who made a promise.

name: Gator Hucker
description: Gator Hucker is a fast-paced brawler where you craft your own unique playstyle! You are alien alligators with wacky abilities locked in battle, in teams or a chaotic free-for-all! Huck into the arena with the help of cybernetically enhanced gorillas and cause chaos for glory and entertainment!

name: 局外人局内人outsiders&insiders
description: "Outsiders&Insiders" is a suspenseful and romantic visual novel for women, featuring three characters you can pursue. You will take on the role of a noble lady in this game, and in the midst of a complex mystery, uncover the secret of your lost memory...

name: Infernal Battles
description: A strategic autobattler where you assemble a powerful army and buy upgrades to enhance it. Balance your resources wisely between miners and units. Refine your tactics to defeat the King and improve your high score!

name: 坍塌世界
description: "Collapsing World" is an innovative tower defense game blending deck-building and roguelike mechanics. Recruit unique companions, craft powerful skill decks, and tackle randomized stages. Deep strategy breaks the traditional TD mold—every run is a fresh challenge!

name: Qiú 泅
description: A rescue robot had lost all teammates in a tsunami. Experience the emotional struggle and empathy in the post-apocalyptic world of Qiú, where, through a series of side-scrolling puzzle games, you help the robot achieve its dream, even at the cost of death.

name: SpellCatcher
description: Spell Catcher is an Open-World Animal-Collection 3D-Platformer where the goal of the game is using magical spells to collect all of the possible animals and send their data back to Big Magic University.

name: Without Regret
description: Free those stuck in regret while uncovering the secrets of the world. Let the path you choose shape who you are and the world you envision.

name: Echo's Cry
description: Echo’s Cry blends intense hack-and-slash combat with rhythm-game precision. Cut through hordes of enemies while striking to the beat, combining fast-paced action with perfectly timed inputs. Battle through a dark Victorian world accompanied by a haunting original soundtrack.

name: Membrillo Hid My Socks
description: Membrillo Hid My Socks is a silly point & click hidden object game about finding your missing socks after your mischievous cat went on a rampage.

name: Teeworlds : Archive
description: TeeworldsArchive is a free online multiplayer game with community support, including Deathmatch and Infection, available for all major PC operating systems. Battle or cooperate in the Tees' world with up to 64 players. You can also play in a map with music.

name: Spirit Cleansers
description: Explore a Heian Estate, uncover cursed objects, and engage in Turn-Based Strategy. During turn-based combat, fight as both priest and warrior synergizing their unique abilities to quell the spiritual mischief plaguing the estate!

name: INKOCHET: Paint The Walls With Your Arrows!
description: A free-to-play retro first-person puzzle game. Shoot arrows that ricochet up to 4 times in order to paint every wall! Solo or 2-player co-op. solo dev btw

name: Roadhouse Simulator - Prologue
description: Experience the uncle’s story before the events of Roadhouse Simulator and explore his humble beginnings while trying your skill as a bouncer at a roadhouse or Route 66.

name: Moksha
description: Navigate through a changed map everytime and all you can see is what your flashlilght reveals. Explore the space while avoiding a being hunting you down, to find out the answer to the mystery of why are you there or even where are you.

name: Afternoon Frontline
description: Afternoon Frontline is a free tower defense game with light roguelite elements. Make random choices, strengthen your characters, refine your team, and put together builds suited to each situation as you hold the line against incoming waves.

name: Infinite Galgame
description: An AI-powered visual novel where every story is written just for you — in real time. Type anything, and watch your unique world unfold.

name: Anything But A Gun
description: A roguelite first-person shooter set in a corporate office overrun by AI. Battle through randomized floors using 20 bizarre weapons. Earn achievements, unlock upgrades, and take back everyone's jobs. The only rule? It's Anything But A Gun.

name: Nightmare Fishing Tournament
description: A fishing sim with a HORRIFYING twist!. It's not enough to simply HOOK a fish, players must ENTER THE WATER and take them on using WEAPONS like spearguns and floating mines! Once a fish is STUNNED, it must be REELED IN before it RECOVERS! Upgrade your ITEMS and use scales to CRAFT PERKS!

name: SKELOST
description: SKELOST is a yokai shooter built for the Game Boy Color, now on Steam. Immerse yourself in Japanese folklore and uncover the fate of your lost family.

name: XorO
description: "XorO" is a 1vs1 fighting-inspired puzzle game that puts focus on the mind games by getting rid of mechanical, input-based complexity while also having a set of simple, easy to understand rules derived from familiar ideas of tic-tac-toe and rock-paper-scissors.

name: Slash The Tower
description: Slash the Tower is a turn-based climb: read foe intent & energy; gold-shop between fights; unlock floors/bosses on the map—rerun at tougher difficulties.

name: Viridi
description: Nurture a small pot of succulents that grow in real time. Viridi is a safe haven, a place you can return to for a moment of peace and quiet whenever you need it.

name: Mini Royale
description: Brace yourself for an action-packed shooter experience in Mini Royale! Battle as green army toy soldiers in a massive kids' bedroom, fighting for survival in modes like Battle Royale, Deathmatch, and more—where only the strongest players or teams claim victory.
notes: Có DLC trả phí; Easy Anti-Cheat [Kernel]

name: Just Act Natural
description: Just Act Natural is a hand-crafted online party game where players must hide among NPC characters to avoid detection from the seeker. Compete against your friends in a variety of game modes over a course of different rounds to be crowned the winner!

name: Adventure Escape Mysteries
description: Play a story-driven room escape game with unique puzzles enjoyed by tens of millions of players. Solve mysteries, puzzle through escape rooms, and find the clue that will crack the case in a critically acclaimed puzzle adventure game!

name: Idle Hacking: An Inaction RPG
description: A persistent idle MMORPG, with a text-based hacking theme. Enjoy the "Inaction RPG" design philosophy by crafting equpiment using ARPG influenced prefix/suffix systems, build or join player managed syndicates, trade on the marketplace, and compete in community events.

name: Phobies
description: Phobies is a tactical card collecting strategy game where players battle one another in the surreal realm of the subconscious, where fears manifest. Use devious tactics and unleash a dazzling array of attacks and abilities to achieve victory!

name: Vacuum Warrior - Idle Game
description: Vacuum Warrior is a Free to Play incremental idle game. Listen to the crisp crackle of dust and debris entering your vacuum as you vacuum ridiculous amounts of dust. Upgrade your vacuums, idle gains, and robot vacuums, earn achievements, and explore numerous locations in the Vacuum Warrior universe!

name: Sniper Fury
description: Sniper Fury is an action-sharpshooting game set in a world threatened by violence. Neutralize threats using an ever-growing arsenal of modern firepower. Customize everything: weapons, gear sets, bullets! Join other snipers in Clan Wars, challenge them in PvP mode, & try events for extra surprises.

name: Territory Idle
description: Strategic idle game. Develop the kingdom, then abdicate and get gold! For gold, you can buy new tiles and expand the territory.

name: Born Again
description: Hack-n-slash your way through the evil brewing in the Outer Realm! Stop the ominous Overlords in their tracks, but tread lightly, for every corner hosts a monster in waiting!

name: Grim Clicker
description: Grim Clicker is an IDLE/RPG clicker where you will find your own strategy to explore the lost worlds. Inspired by games such as Diablo, Grim Dawn, Dark Souls, etc., the game features a complex character development, many unique items, active and passive playstyle.

name: Watch
description: Watch is a free incremental game combined with collecting wristwatches integrated into Steam inventory.

name: UNDEFEATED
description: Become an invincible hero with unlimited super powers on UNDEFEATED!

name: Toribash
description: Toribash is an innovative free-to-play online turn-based fighting game where you’re able to design your own moves. Complete control over character's body, hundreds of game mods and bloody mess with full body dismemberment - you've never been able to annihilate your enemies like that before!

name: Picross Touch
description: Find the hidden image in this fun and addictive logic puzzle game. All puzzles have unique solutions, ensuring 100% logically solvable puzzle grids.

name: Soda Dungeon 2
description: Everyone’s favorite laid-back dungeon crawler returns in Soda Dungeon 2. Featuring a new adventure, a whole town to upgrade, crafting, new classes, alternate dimensions, and more! It’s everything you loved about the original plus all the stuff you’ve been asking for.

name: Sneak Out
description: Sneak Out is a free to play multiplayer game full of mischief and fun for up to six players. Enter the Haunted Castle and prepare to hunt, hide, or prank 'em all, causing all kinds of hilarious mayhem while trying to win the deadly game of hide and seek!

name: My Lands: Black Gem Hunting
description: My Lands is a free online RTS where dark and light forces fight for Black Gem and dominion in a vast fantasy world. Cooperation between players, joint economy development, creation of clans and alliances and elaboration of a team strategy serve as the very foundation of the game.

name: Idle Spiral
description: This is a beautiful "Idle", "Incremental" game based on spirals and mathematics. Your goal is to make the spiral grow farther and farther from the origin. The game is very simple, but it is very deep and can be enjoyed for a long time!

name: Idle Pixel Fantasy
description: Recruit hard-working helpers and magical creatures that automatically collect gold and crystals. Unlock new levels, invest in stronger units, and work your way up to the powerful dragon boss at the top. A relaxing pixel-style idle clicker!

name: hexceed
description: A relaxing, hexagon based, puzzle game. An exciting new twist on a classic game without the element of guesswork! Use your critical thinking and our stimulating game mechanics to progress through hundreds of levels!

name: KUBOOM
description: Cross-platform hurricane online 3D Shooter

name: Sarah's Adventure: Time Travel
description: This game unearths the essence of adventure by combining elements of exploration and puzzle-solving. The game’s appeal lies in its interactive gameplay mechanics, where your choices dictate the progression of the story.

name: Kingdom: Classic
description: Kingdom is a 2D sidescrolling strategy/resource management hybrid with a minimalist feel wrapped in a beautiful, modern pixel art aesthetic.

name: The Pirate: Caribbean Hunt
description: Hail to the Captain! Sail into the heart of the Caribbean in the Age of Piracy - the time of black flags and white skulls, blue waves and golden opportunities. Hoist the Jolly Roger and grab the steering wheel to sail through battles and raids, ransoms and treasures, to become the Crimson King of the Antilles!

name: Beavers Be Dammed
description: Beavers be Dammed is a two player local co-op game in which two beavers perform heists under time pressure to steal wood from a sawmill under crazy circumstances!

name: Villagers and Heroes
description: Enter a magical, 3D fantasy world filled with hundreds of unique locales, immersive lore, and exciting quests -- and it's all free to play. Join thousands of players from around the world, and be part of a one of a kind community.

name: DPS IDLE
description: Collect cards, upgrade cards, defeat monsters, join guilds and hire heroes. Raise your DPS!

name: Jigsaw Puzzles Infinite
description: Sit back, relax and build puzzles to your heart's content. Assemble one of the many included puzzles, or add your own images. Customize size and shape of the pieces for any puzzle. Enjoy Classic mode or try out Zen mode for a new type of puzzle experience.

name: Holyday City: Reloaded
description: Build, manage & grow your city in Holyday City: Reloaded! An idle clicker game where you're the business tycoon, expanding your metropolis. Master resource & time management to upgrade businesses and thrive. Experience the ultimate town builder adventure with Holyday City.

name: Hide and Shriek
description: Scare or be scared in this FREE adrenaline-pumping multiplayer game full of hijinks and mischief! Set traps, cast spells, and scare the living hell out of your opponent to win!

name: Looters
description: A couch co-op goblin heist for 2 players. Sneak, stack, and steal your way through a guarded manor packed with enemies, secrets, and loot. Take everything… and get out alive.

name: Thief Simulator 2: Prologue
description: Tired of political exploitation? Join me and let's rebuild our thieving business together! Let's steal cars, radios, and TVs - anything that catches your eye can be yours! Recall what it's like to be a thief in Thief Simulator 2: Prologue!

name: I Sell Lemonade: Prologue
description: You’re the boss of the block. Sell lemonade, make cash, get a bike, impress the girls — and live the summer you’ll never forget.

name: Pincremental
description: Become the Pinball Wizard you were destined to be! Master the pinball machine, cash out for powerful upgrades and automation, and climb the corporate ladder in this Pinball Incremental.

name: 全网公敌：诡村
description: 本作是与《全网公敌》联动的全新故事，通过一台“旧电脑”进行互联网搜索解密的剧情互动游戏。你作为一名特殊调查员，需要负责解开隐藏在“登山客意外失踪”背后的超自然事件。随着调查深入，始作俑者也渐渐浮出水面，“祂”，似乎又与四十多年前消失在大火中的白河村，有着千丝万缕的联系。

name: Formula Evolution 2025
description: Your favorite indie formula MMO is back! Experience the evolution of formulas with up to 39 friends!
